name: numeric
title: Numeric Grid Widget
description: Dashboard widget renderer that paints a 3×2 grid of compact KPI boxes — each a quiet label over a large tone-colored mono value with a trailing unit (CPU %, Memory %, Disk %, Network Mb, Latency ms, Errors /m). Registered as OOW.numeric and auto-mounted from a [data-widget="numeric"] mount; values are deterministic from data-seed. Tone modifiers recolor only the value; supports a compact density and a disabled/no-data state.
